data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Selangor, Johor, Sarawak and Western Sabah and Labuan, Eastern Sabah until 10:00AM; Friday, 26 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Selangor, Johor, Sarawak dan Sabah Barat dan Labuan, Sabah Timur sehingga 10:00 pagi; Jumaat, 26 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, Samui, northern part of Tioman, western part of Condore, eastern part of Bunguran, Reef South, Labuan and Sulu until 10:00AM; Friday, 26 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket, Selat Melaka, Samui, utara Tioman, barat Condore, timur Bunguran, Reef South, Labuan dan Sulu sehingga 10:00 pagi; Jumaat, 26 Jun 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Sarawak:  Kuching (Lundu), Betong, Sarikei (Sarikei and Meradong), Sibu (Selangau), Mukah, Kapit (Belaga) and Bintulu until 9:00AM; Friday, 26 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Sarawak:  Kuching (Lundu), Betong, Sarikei (Sarikei dan Meradong), Sibu (Selangau), Mukah, Kapit (Belaga) dan Bintulu sehingga 9:00 pagi; Jumaat, 26 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
